violations.text: The hand-washing sinks paper towel dispensers were not operational. Dispensers were fixed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets of cold drawers have an accumulation of old food residue. Gaskets to be cleaned. The non food contact surfaces of the ice machine had an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The hand-washing sinks were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
A half empty can of red bull was observed in the hand washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the open air display cooler vents have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The outside dumpsters were not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
